perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A female host stands in a crowded Costco warehouse holding a large, white, fluffy blanket. She smiles and talks to the camera while shoppers pass by with carts in the background. (2) She unfolds the blanket to its full size, demonstrating its large scale, then wraps it around her shoulders to show its softness and warmth. (3) A hand from off-camera points at the texture of the blanket. The host continues to stroke the faux fur while the camera shows boxes of similar blankets in pink and white on a nearby shelf.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, high-tempo electronic background music plays continuously. A female voice speaks excitedly in Mandarin, introducing a product. (2) A male voice joins from off-camera, engaging in a dialogue about the product's value and price. (3) The conversation remains high-energy with consistent background warehouse noise, including indistinct chatter and the sound of shopping carts moving.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Functional Text: 'COSTCO WHOLESALE' logo appears at the top throughout. (2) Decorative/Hook Text: '大家搶著買 超美大毛皮毯毯 889元有限購' (Everyone is rushing to buy, super beautiful large faux fur blanket, 889 TWD, limited purchase) and '黑五好康' (Black Friday deals). (3) Functional Text: Traditional Chinese subtitles translate the spoken dialogue throughout the video.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Hook -> Product Demo -> Price/Value Discussion -> Final Recommendation

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female host as the main character, approximately 11 shoppers visible in the background background.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Young female with long dark hair, wearing a white and blue long-sleeved top and a black skirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A typical Costco warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial shelves stocked with blanket boxes, and numerous shoppers with metal carts.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Highlight -> Price Comparison -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote a specific Mon Chateau brand faux fur blanket available at Costco. By leveraging Black Friday urgency and demonstrating the product's softness, size, and significant price drop (from 1119 to 889 TWD), the content seeks to drive store traffic and sales.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct product demonstration, verbal price promotion, and specific store location targeting.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: High-speed shopping recommendation with persistent promotional text overlays.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: Typical influencer-led 'shopping guide' content style common on platforms like TikTok or Reels, focusing on deals and product experience.
